checks.name: tenant and repository authority
checks.summary: Repository-bound stores, cross-repository foreign keys, and lease keys reject authority crossing.

checks.name: transaction and fencing integrity
checks.summary: Aggregate writes, immutable events, idempotency receipts, outbox rows, and database-clock lease checks are transactionally enforced.

checks.name: canonical event immutability
checks.summary: Append-only triggers, exact schema signatures, and replay verification reject mutation and semantic drift.

checks.name: PostgreSQL credential boundary
checks.summary: Recovery scripts accept credentials only through the environment, remove embedded passwords from child arguments, preserve multi-host libpq semantics, and never print the credential.

checks.name: workflow supply-chain controls
checks.summary: GitHub Actions are commit-pinned and PostgreSQL 18.3 is referenced by immutable image digest.

residual_risks: Environment variables are less exposed than process arguments but are not a secret vault; production deployment must use a dedicated identity and secret manager.
Remote authentication and user-facing authorization are deferred to the governed MCP boundary in Sprint 03.
Migrations are applied transactionally; online zero-downtime index orchestration is intentionally outside Sprint 02 and requires an operator maintenance plan.
